Brownstone Careers — 22-Page Employee & Contractor Handbook Website
Official Branding Edition

Open index.html in a modern browser.

Included:
- Official uploaded Brownstone Careers branding
- Dark navy background treatment that blends with the brand artwork
- 22 responsive handbook sections
- Desktop, tablet, and mobile navigation
- Previous/Next controls
- Print / Save as PDF support
- Fillable employee acknowledgement section
- Local assets; no external dependencies

Publishing:
Upload the complete folder contents to your hosting provider. Keep the assets folder beside index.html.
